title: DK's Tabla
summary: Creative post designs built around classical music, performance moments and memorable visual communication.
outcome: A memorable social presence that carried the spirit of tabla and classical performance without leaning on cliché visuals.

seo.title: DK's Tabla — Social Media Creatives | Shubham Pendse
seo.description: Social media creatives for DK's Tabla shaped around classical music, cultural expression and brand presence.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: DK's Tabla needed a set of social creatives that felt cultural and rooted, without becoming decorative. The work covered performance posts, teaching updates and brand-tone visuals.

sections.heading: Approach
sections.body: I leaned into confident typography, restrained colour and clean spatial rhythm — letting the subject carry the emotion. Every post was built to feel like part of the same body of work.
